description: Builder-first Dawson County, GA template with corrected phase placement, practical dependency gates, and cleaner turnover sequencing for tracking subcontracted work.

steps.title: Confirm lot ownership, zoning, setbacks, easements, and deed restrictions
steps.description: Verify legal build rights and constraints before spending on design and permitting.

steps.title: Complete boundary and topographic survey
steps.description: Capture buildable area, contours, and constraints used for site plan and engineering.

steps.title: Perform soil/percolation and geotechnical checks
steps.description: Validate septic feasibility and foundation assumptions for plan design.

steps.title: Confirm utility availability and service paths (power, water/sewer or well, gas, telecom)
steps.description: Collect utility availability and connection requirements prior to permit submittal.

steps.title: Finalize architectural and engineered plan set
steps.description: Prepare complete plan package including structural details and site plan.

steps.title: Finalize construction budget, contracts, draw schedule, and contingency plan
steps.description: Lock budget baseline, execute core builder/subcontract scope agreements, confirm draw timing, and set contingency controls before major commitments.

steps.title: Finalize owner selections and allowance decisions
steps.description: Finalize key finish and fixture selections to reduce field changes and schedule risk.

steps.title: Prepare contractor affidavits, licenses, and insurance/workers comp documents
steps.description: County checklist includes affidavits and contractor credential documentation for permit issuance.

steps.title: Obtain approved Dawson County addressing form (E-911)
steps.description: Address assignment is listed in the county residential permit checklist.

steps.title: Obtain driveway/encroachment permit
steps.description: Required by Dawson County Public Works for county road access (and GDOT permit if on a state route).
steps.source_ref: Dawson County Public Works driveway permit page

steps.title: Obtain septic permit or sewer connection approval
steps.description: County checklist requires environmental health permit for septic systems where sewer is unavailable.

steps.title: Obtain land disturbance permit (LDP)
steps.description: Required before grading/site disturbance. Include NOI and 7-day letter if disturbing over 1 acre.
steps.source_ref: Dawson County development forms and LDP guidance

steps.title: File NPDES NOI and EPD 7-day letter (if disturbed area is over 1 acre)
steps.description: Georgia EPD stormwater documentation is required with county land-disturbance workflows above threshold.

steps.title: Submit residential building permit application packet
steps.description: Submit plans, forms, and required supporting documents listed by Dawson County.

steps.title: Receive approved residential building permit
steps.description: Do not start site construction until permit approval is issued.

steps.title: Release long-lead material and equipment orders
steps.description: Place orders for long-lead items such as windows/doors, trusses, panels, HVAC equipment, and specialty fixtures.

steps.title: Set up jobsite logistics/safety and complete 811 utility locates before excavation
steps.description: Establish site access, sanitation, dumpster/safety controls, then confirm utility locate marks before mechanized excavation/trenching.

steps.title: Install erosion and sediment control BMPs
steps.description: Install and maintain controls before clearing/grading per LDP requirements.

steps.title: Install temporary power pole and pass temporary electrical inspection
steps.description: Temporary service inspection is listed on county inspection guidance for construction power.

steps.title: Clear, grub, and rough-grade homesite
steps.description: Prepare house pad, construction access, and preliminary drainage.

steps.title: Excavate and form footings with reinforcement
steps.description: Set footing depth, rebar, and forms per engineered plans.

steps.title: Pass footing inspection
steps.description: County-required inspection gate prior to concrete placement progression.

steps.title: Complete foundation/slab formwork and under-slab prep
steps.description: Set forms, plumbing penetrations, moisture barrier prep, and reinforcement layout.

steps.title: Install underground plumbing and drain/waste/vent stub-outs
steps.description: Install below-slab sanitary and water lines prior to slab pour.

steps.title: Pass underground plumbing inspection
steps.description: County-required plumbing inspection before slab placement.

steps.title: Install slab reinforcement and vapor barrier
steps.description: Complete pre-pour slab assembly including vapor barrier and reinforcement.

steps.title: Pour slab/foundation concrete
steps.description: Place and finish foundation concrete after pre-pour inspections are complete.

steps.title: Pass foundation inspection
steps.description: Approval gate before framing begins.

steps.title: Frame floors, walls, roof, and rough openings
steps.description: Build structural shell and install roof decking/sheathing.

steps.title: Dry-in shell (roofing underlayment, windows, doors, weather barrier)
steps.description: Protect structure from weather before rough MEP progresses.

steps.title: Install exterior cladding/veneer and weatherproof details
steps.description: Complete exterior finish systems and flashing details.

steps.title: Install rough mechanical/HVAC systems and ductwork
steps.description: Set equipment rough-in, duct trunks/branches, and condensate routing.

steps.title: Install rough plumbing in walls/ceilings
steps.description: Complete DWV, vent, and water distribution rough-in.

steps.title: Install rough electrical wiring, panel, and branch circuits
steps.description: Run branch circuits, panel feeders, grounding, and device boxes.

steps.title: Complete rough gas piping pressure test and inspection (if gas service is used)
steps.description: Gas systems require pressure testing and approval before concealment.

steps.title: Pass rough mechanical inspection
steps.description: Mechanical/HVAC rough inspection gate.

steps.title: Pass rough plumbing inspection
steps.description: Plumbing rough inspection gate prior to insulation/drywall.

steps.title: Pass rough electrical inspection
steps.description: Electrical rough inspection gate prior to insulation/drywall.

steps.title: Pass framing inspection
steps.description: Structural framing inspection required before concealment.

steps.title: Pre-drywall gate complete (inspections + photo documentation)
steps.description: All framing/rough MEP inspections passed and photo documentation captured before insulation/drywall.

steps.title: Install wall/ceiling insulation and air sealing
steps.description: Install thermal envelope components per energy code.

steps.title: Pass insulation inspection
steps.description: County-required inspection before drywall coverage.

steps.title: Hang, tape, and finish drywall
steps.description: Complete interior wall/ceiling drywall installation.

steps.title: Install interior trim, doors, cabinets, and paint
steps.description: Complete major interior finish carpentry and paint work.

steps.title: Install flooring and tile finishes
steps.description: Install final floor coverings and wet-area tile work.

steps.title: Install plumbing fixtures and trim-out
steps.description: Set fixtures, trim valves, and complete plumbing finish connections.

steps.title: Install electrical devices, lighting, and panel terminations
steps.description: Complete receptacles, switches, fixtures, breakers, and labeling.

steps.title: Complete HVAC trim-out, startup, and balancing
steps.description: Set equipment, registers, controls, and startup commissioning.

steps.title: Complete permanent water service (or well completion) and meter setup
steps.description: Finalize potable water service needed for final plumbing and occupancy.

steps.title: Install septic system and field lines (if not already installed)
steps.description: Complete septic construction to approved permit design.

steps.title: Construct permanent driveway and tie-in
steps.description: Finish driveway required for safe permanent access and final approvals.

steps.title: Complete final grading, drainage stabilization, and site cleanup
steps.description: Finalize site drainage and stabilization for closeout and erosion compliance.

steps.title: Pass final plumbing inspection
steps.description: Final county plumbing approval.

steps.title: Pass final electrical inspection
steps.description: Final county electrical approval for permanent service and occupancy.

steps.title: Pass electrical service release inspection for permanent power
steps.description: County inspection guidance includes service release coordination before utility energization.

steps.title: Pass final mechanical inspection and verify HVAC/envelope performance
steps.description: Complete final mechanical approval and required performance verification (for example blower-door/duct leakage/system balancing as applicable).

steps.title: Pass final gas inspection (if gas service is used)
steps.description: Gas final approval where gas systems are part of the build.

steps.title: Obtain septic final approval (if septic system is used)
steps.description: Environmental health final approval required for occupied septic-served homes.

steps.title: Obtain well completion/final approval (if private well is used)
steps.description: Complete any required well authority approvals for private well water systems.

steps.title: Complete erosion-control closeout/NOC (when required by disturbed acreage)
steps.description: Close stormwater permit obligations after final stabilization when applicable.
steps.source_ref: Dawson County development forms and LDP guidance

steps.title: Pass final building inspection
steps.description: Final building inspection after trade finals and site completion.

steps.title: Receive certificate of occupancy
steps.description: Occupancy authorization after all required final approvals are complete.

steps.title: Owner final walk-through, punch list signoff, and turnover readiness check
steps.description: Confirm contract scope completion, document any final punch items, and sign turnover readiness before occupancy handoff.

steps.title: Complete owner systems orientation, maintenance training, and final cleaning handoff
steps.description: Train owner on panel/shutoffs/HVAC/filter cycles, provide operating guidance, and hand over a move-in-ready cleaned home.

steps.title: Deliver consolidated closeout package (permits, cards, manuals, warranties, as-builts)
steps.description: Deliver one final turnover package with all approved records and warranty documentation for long-term operations and resale.
